input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.7.1.6 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ev.7.1.6
            TITLE: the team must be able to demonstrate all features and functions of the shutdown circuit and

            CONTENT:
            rule EV.7.1.6: The team must be able to demonstrate all features and functions of the Shutdown Circuit and
EV.7.1.6 The team must be able to demonstrate all features and functions of the Shutdown Circuit and 
components at Electrical Technical Inspection.

final_answer: rule EV.7.1.6: The team must be able to demonstrate all features and functions of the Shutdown Circuit and components at Electrical Technical Inspection.
